summary_ja: raw-backlog-ingest バッチ。5件中2件は既存概念ページに既にキャプ済み（functional-emotions-llms、gpu-cloud-rankings）。残り3件はAI無関係（PostgreSQL fsync、プラットフォームモデレーション、HPMOR書評）。すべてスキップ。

decisions.title: errors on fsync are unrecovarable
decisions.reason_ja: ★★☆☆☆ AI無関係。PostgreSQLのfsync()エラー処理に関するメーリングリストスレッドのアーカイブ。ファイルシステム/データベースの安全性トピックだが、LLM/エージェント/開発ツールとは無関係。
decisions.body_excerpt: This is an archive of the original "fsyncgate" email thread. This is posted here because I wanted to have a link that would fit on a slide for a talk on file safety with a mobile-friendly non-bloated format. From:Craig Ringer <craig(at)2ndquadrant(dot)com> Subject:Re: PostgreSQL's handling of fsync() errors is unsafe and risks data loss at least on XFS

decisions.title: Emotion Concepts and their Function in a Large Language Model
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ AnthropicのClaude Sonnet 4.5における機能的感情表現の研究。concepts/functional-emotions-llms.md（2026-05-20更新）に既に包括的にキャプ済み。同ページの本文では171感情ベクトル、因果的影響、アライメントへの影響などが詳述されている。
decisions.body_excerpt: Large language models (LLMs) sometimes appear to exhibit emotional reactions. We investigate why this is the case in Claude Sonnet 4.5 and explore implications for alignment-relevant behavior. We find internal representations of emotion concepts, which encode the broad concept of a particular emotion and generalize across contexts and behaviors it might be linked to.

decisions.title: Diseconomies of scale in fraud, spam, support, and moderation
decisions.reason_ja: ★★☆☆☆ AI無関係。大規模プラットフォームのモデレーション/スパム/詐欺における規模の不経済に関するエッセイ。一般技術批評であり、LLM/エージェント技術とは直接関係ない。
decisions.body_excerpt: If I ask myself a question like "I'd like to buy an SD card; who do I trust to sell me a real SD card and not some fake, Amazon or my local Best Buy?", of course the answer is that I trust my local Best Buy more than Amazon, which is notorious for selling counterfeit SD cards.

decisions.title: ClusterMAX 2.0: The Industry Standard GPU Cloud Rating System
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ SemiAnalysisのGPUクラウド評価ランキング。concepts/gpu-cloud-rankings.md（2026-05-20作成）に既に包括的にキャプ済み。ClusterMAX 2.0の84社評価、10カテゴリ基準、Slurm-on-Kubernetes比較、GB200 NVL72信頼性などが詳述されている。
decisions.body_excerpt: GPU clouds (also known as "Neoclouds" since October of last year) are at the center of the AI boom. Neoclouds represent some of the most important transactions in AI, the critical juncture where end users rent GPUs to train models, process data, and build inference endpoints.

decisions.title: Harry Potter and the Methods of Rationality review by su3su2u1
decisions.reason_ja: ☆☆☆☆☆ AI無関係。HPMOR（Harry Potter and the Methods of Rationality）の書評アーカイブ。フィクション批評であり、LLM/エージェント技術とは無関係。
decisions.body_excerpt: These are archived from the now defunct su3su2u1 tumblr. Since there was some controversy over su3su2u1's identity, I'll note that I am not su3su2u1 and that hosting this material is neither an endorsement nor a sign of agreement. Harry Potter and the Methods of Rationality full review
